flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Catherine University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.5k → $51.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St Catherine University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.5k → $51.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Catherine University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
